pkmn.lore: Bound by weight and limit, a shape space itself can sustain. Its power yet governs distance and separation, though restrained, for the world cannot bear the weight of infinite breadth given form.

hiddenAbility.nerf: When slotted as a non-hidden ability: Speed reduced to x1.5
When slotted as a non-hidden ability: Damage reduced to x1.35

common.lore: Emerged to give shape to knowledge. When the world was still new, it shared understanding with humanity, allowing thought and memory to take root. Its presence quiets turmoil to the gods of time and space.
The cold of winter. Air chills and frost gathers in its wake. Snowfall follows as it passes, and mountains are left sealed in ice where it lingers.

hiddenAbility.nerf: When slotted as a non-hidden ability: Speed reduced to x1.5
